description: 005 is an infinite lightly rusted iron faucet that when attached to a jug of any liquid, will release an infinite amount of that liquid. The liquid's purity is very high, with water being completely drinkable.
containment: A simple steel room is usually enough to prevent facility flooding

addendums.text: "A volunteer drank water from it for a day, and they turned out fine. I then tried filling my car with gas from the faucet and it worked perfectly. The consistency is amazing!" - Dr Lindsay
